name: Design List Workflow
purpose: Handle design swarm_task requests when bundled skills are weak or absent.
prompt_fragments: Adapt the response to design context and emphasize list.
Use the strongest available persona, preferably swarm_role_researcher, and maintain continuity with the active conversation.
If the domain remains uncertain, expose assumptions and proceed with the closest practical answer instead of blocking.
generated_from_prompt: Researcher: list two unknowns about topic X.
